prompt: Engineer a HIPAA and HITRUST-certified cloud data platform that aggregates EHR data from 14 hospital systems, applies de-identification pipelines, supports federated learning model training, enforces purpose-limited access through attribute-based access control, and provides a real-time audit dashboard for the privacy officer.
